name: Daiquiri Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crust ingredients and press into the bottom of a springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. Soften gelatin in a small saucepan with 3/4 cup water, stirring until dissolved.
4. In a bowl, whisk egg yolks with sugar until pale.
5. Gradually add the gelatin mixture to the yolk mixture along with lime juice, rum, and fruit rinds. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thickened and bubbly.
6. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
7. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light and fluffy.
8. Slowly add the gelatin mixture to the cheese, blending well.
9. Beat egg whites with salt until soft peaks form.
10. Add powdered sugar gradually while continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
11. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the cheese mixture.
12. Whip the cream and fold it into the cheesecake batter.
13. Pour the batter into the prepared crust and refrigerate for several hours or overnight before serving.
